home.badge: ⚡ Cut 40–70% of operational time on quotes and follow-up
home.h1a: Your operation doesn't need more improvisation.
home.sub: Every hour your team loses building quotes by hand, hunting for loose files or fixing manual errors is a sales opportunity slipping away. Get that time back with a system designed for your real operation.
home.resultsTitle: What changes when the engine goes live
home.before1: Quotes built by hand across loose files
home.after1: Quotes with centralized logic in seconds
home.result1: You go from quoting across loose files to responding with centralized logic.
home.result2: You cut manual errors in quotes, follow-up and documentation.
home.result3: You filter better before talking to each prospect.
home.result4: You organize your sales process without relying on human memory or improvisation.
home.result5: You turn a scattered operation into a clear system for selling and service.
home.testi1: "We went from 2 hours per quote to 3 minutes. Calculation errors disappeared completely."
home.testi2: "We now have full control of the client lifecycle, from acquisition to delivery."
home.testi3: "Patients arrive pre-qualified, with clear expectations. Last-minute cancellations dropped."
home.segSub: Not everyone buys the same way. We design a different architecture for companies with complex operations and for professionals who need order.
home.segCompDesc: If your operation no longer fits in Excel, we design a system to quote faster, reduce errors and issue documents instantly.
home.segProDesc: If you depend on word of mouth, we build a system to capture better, filter prospects and convert more without saturating your time.
home.pipeSub: This is how the process works, from the first message to the system in production.
home.step1Desc: You tell us about your operation and the core problem
home.step2Desc: We assess whether there's a real fit, no selling for selling's sake
home.step3Desc: We map your current flow, friction by friction
home.step4Desc: We design and build the custom engine
home.fil1D: You show us how you sell or quote today.
home.fil2D: We detect whether there's friction worth solving.
home.fil3D: If there's a fit, we present the system and the next step.
home.casosSub: This isn't theory. These are systems running today, with measurable results.
home.casosInfra: Active infrastructure managed by our firm
home.precSub: Choose the plan that fits your operation. No ambiguity.
home.precBizTag: For companies that need to turn web + WhatsApp into a sales engine with better follow-up and fewer repetitive tasks.
home.precBizMonthly: USD 30/month for maintenance, updates and operational upkeep
home.precEntTag: For operations that need quoting engines, automation, integrations and more robust operational control.
home.precEntMonthly: USD 45/month for maintenance, updates and operational upkeep
home.precNote: Plans are structured as an initial system build + monthly operational maintenance. Contract duration and final terms are defined in the formal proposal.
home.waBiz: Hi Oscar, I'd like to book a B2B audit for my operation. I'm interested in the Business plan.
home.waEnt: Hi Oscar, I'd like to book a B2B audit for my operation. I'm interested in the Enterprise plan.
home.garDesc: First we measure how much time your team loses. Then we design the system to cut repetitive tasks. If the first stage doesn't deliver a validated operational improvement, we cancel the project and refund the initial payment.
home.gar2D: If the first stage doesn't deliver a validated operational improvement, we cancel the project and refund the initial payment.
tools.title: Open Operational Tools
tools.sub: Free resources designed to remove technical friction from your day-to-day sales work.
pricomp.anchorText: Either plan replaces 1 admin assistant + 1 junior salesperson in your operation. The system doesn't get tired, doesn't get sick and doesn't ask for a raise.
pricomp.note: The detailed features are representative of each plan. The final proposal is defined in the diagnostic stage based on your specific operation.
recursos.sub: Articles, guides and analysis on sales automation, digital infrastructure and operational management for companies across the region.
recursos.ctaKicker: Want to apply this to your operation?
obras.sub: No renders, no generic promises. This showroom presents the systems in operation, focused on the real value they deliver.
obras.casosSub: We don't just show visual work. We show systems in production that save time, reduce operational friction and help sell better.
obras.recoverSub: Digital infrastructure filters inquiries, speeds up quotes and organizes opportunities. That's what we build: commercial machines that turn slow processes into measurable metrics.
obras.ctaTitle: Does your operation face similar problems?
obras.ctaSub: If your company hits bottlenecks in quoting, order tracking or client acquisition, request a free B2B diagnostic.
prof.h1a: Your schedule doesn't need more loose WhatsApp messages.
prof.sub: We set up your lead capture, inquiry filter and scheduling link so your clients book themselves — without you glued to your phone.
prof.payNote: Pay in USDT and we deploy in 24 h.
prof.p1Desc: You confirm appointments one by one. Every time someone asks about price, time or availability, you're the one answering manually.
prof.p2Desc: Three messages to book, two to confirm, one to reschedule. Your service time goes to admin, not your real work.
prof.p3Desc: People message you without knowing the price, what you offer, or any real intent to hire. You filter inquiries instead of closing clients.
prof.offerSub: Entry plan for independent professionals. It doesn't replace a full enterprise system; it organizes your capture, scheduling and WhatsApp to start fast.
prof.cardTagline: We leave everything set up and running so you start receiving bookings from day one.
prof.setup1: Capture page with your offer made clear
prof.setup3: Online scheduling link (Calendly or Google Calendar)
prof.setup5: Direct WhatsApp link pre-filled per service
prof.mant1: Hosting and uptime for the whole infrastructure
prof.mant2: Technical support for any downtime or adjustment
prof.activateNote: We contact you within 24 business hours to coordinate the setup.
prof.diagKicker: Does your operation already have more volume?
prof.diagText: If you already handle several clients, scheduling, quotes, orders or follow-up over WhatsApp, it's worth running a diagnostic before choosing the system.
prof.waActivate: Hi Oscar, I'm an independent professional and I'd like to activate {plan} for ${setup}.
prof.faqQ1: How much does the automatic scheduling system for professionals cost?
prof.faqA1: The AYCweb Start plan has a one-time setup of USD {setup}. Monthly maintenance is USD {mant}/month, due on the 15th of each month.
prof.faqQ2: How long until the online scheduling is set up?
prof.faqA2: Within 24 business hours of payment. The system includes a capture page, pre-qualification form and online scheduling link.
prof.faqQ3: What kind of professionals does this system work for?
prof.faqA3: Doctors, dentists, psychologists, lawyers, architects, nutritionists, accountants and any independent professional who manages appointments or inquiries over WhatsApp.
prof.faqQ4: Can the system filter inquiries before they reach WhatsApp?
prof.faqA4: Yes. It includes a pre-qualification form that filters inquiries by defined criteria: service type, time availability and client budget.
emp.sub: Dynamic quoting engines, PDF generation and operational engines for companies that already invoice seriously and need to stop quoting by hand.
emp.doloresTitle: What you'll stop doing by hand
emp.doloresSub: If these pains sound familiar, you're ready for real infrastructure.
emp.dol2Despues: Manual calculation errors eliminated through parametric quoting.
emp.dol3Despues: A system that filters before you talk
emp.planesSub: You pay once for the setup. Then only monthly maintenance so the engine never stops.
emp.bizTagline: A solid base to start systematizing capture, presentation and your first sales flow.
emp.bizIdeal: Companies just moving off Excel and manual WhatsApp.
emp.entTagline: Complete infrastructure with real automation for companies with sales volume.
emp.entIdeal: Companies with complex sales processes and data at scale.
emp.medTagline: For operations with their own logic, ERP integrations or complex bottlenecks.
emp.waBiz: Hi Oscar, I'm interested in the AYCweb Business plan (${bizSetup}) for my company.
emp.waEnt: Hi Oscar, I'm interested in the AYCweb Enterprise plan (${entSetup}) for my company.
emp.waMed: Hi Oscar, I'd like to request a diagnostic for a Custom Architecture.
emp.stagesSub: This is how we spread the financial commitment across the project.
emp.stage1Desc: To start the project: USD {bizAnt} for AYCweb Business or USD {entAnt} for AYCweb Enterprise.
emp.stage2Desc: On definition and functional scope: USD {bizDef} for Business or USD {entDef} for Enterprise.
emp.stage3Desc: On implementation and development: USD {bizImpl} for Business or USD {entImpl} for Enterprise.
emp.stage4Desc: On testing and final delivery: USD {bizPru} for Business or USD {entPru} for Enterprise.
emp.monthlyNote: Monthly maintenance is billed on the 15th of each month after going into production.
emp.fastTrack: ⚡ Administrative Fast-Track (Optional): If your accounting department prefers to avoid the friction of multiple approvals, you can settle 100% of the setup in a single move at the start of the project. Same staged guarantee, zero bureaucracy.
emp.checkoutNote: First step of the project: operational diagnostic with no commitment to continue.
emp.maintDesc: USD 30/month for AYCweb Business and USD 45/month for AYCweb Enterprise.
emp.maintNote: Billed on the 15th of each month after going into production.
emp.sectSub: Every sector has its own quoting logic. We know it.
emp.s1Desc: Quoting engines with raw material and margin calculations
emp.s3Desc: Quoting by hectare, lot and season
emp.s5Desc: Estimates by project, blueprints and materials
emp.s6Desc: Freight, route and operating cost calculations
emp.garDesc: Smart Staged Guarantee: If during the first definition stage we can't validate that the system will solve the agreed operational problem, we cancel the project and refund the initial payment under the agreed terms.
emp.gar1D: Not before. First the diagnostic, then the proposal. If you accept it, we start.
emp.gar2D: If the first stage doesn't solve the agreed operational problem, we cancel the project and refund the initial payment as agreed.
emp.finalSub: In 15 minutes we assess whether your operation qualifies for our B2B deployment. If not, we'll tell you that too. No runaround.
nos.heroP1: We don't build websites. We build time machines and digital bridges that automate sales and operations.
nos.heroP2: Every dollar you put into our system comes back multiplied because the machine doesn't sleep, doesn't take a bonus and doesn't make quoting mistakes.
nos.bioP1: Over 12 years building systems from scratch. I learned technology because I saw that the systems Paraguayan companies needed didn't exist — or were priced as if imported, without understanding the local operation.
nos.bioP2: I discovered that the scarcest resource of a CEO or a doctor isn't money, it's time. And I decided to build systems that give it back.
nos.bioQuote: “I watched Paraguayan companies lose hours — and sales — to manual processes, and I decided to build the time machines that didn't exist.”
nos.layer1D: The result that matters to you: more revenue, more free time, real return on every investment.
nos.layer2D: The technical backing: AI agents that think for you and unbreakable code (Next.js, Supabase) that keeps the operation running 24/7.
nos.layer3D: The metaphor that explains it all: 2-hour processes reduced to 3 seconds. They literally give you back years of operational life.
nos.bridgeDesc: Your company is already excellent in the physical world. You make the best furniture, give the best consultations, manufacture with the best quality. Our job is to build the titanium bridge so that same excellence exists in the digital world without losing quality.
nos.bridge1D: Your company already works. You have clients, product and operations. That stays untouched.
nos.bridge2D: Automatic quoting engines, sales funnels, dashboards. The infrastructure that connects your excellence to the digital world.
nos.bridge3D: Sales that come in on their own, quotes generated in seconds, clients filtered automatically.
nos.timeDesc: A system that takes a 2-hour manual process and reduces it to 3 automatic seconds is literally giving you back years of operational life.
nos.before1: Quotes built by hand in Excel — 45 min per client
nos.before2: Repetitive WhatsApp messages — 2-3 hours a day
nos.before3: Manual filtering of the curious — wasting time on people who won't buy
nos.before4: Quotes lost between chats and notebooks
nos.afterTitle: What your system does for you
nos.after1: Automatic quote in 3 seconds — without opening Excel
nos.after2: Agents respond and filter — only qualified leads arrive
nos.after3: Every opportunity is logged — nothing is lost
nos.after4: Your team closes deals, the machine does the heavy lifting
nos.metricDesc: That's a Time Machine. That's what we build.
nos.archDesc: Once you've promised the sky, the rational brain asks for proof. Here's our engineering credentials. We don't use prefab templates. We build intelligence.
nos.agent1D: Audits your current operation, surveys processes and documents requirements with surgical precision.
nos.agent2D: Designs the system structure, the data model and the necessary integrations.
nos.agent3D: Writes modular, testable and documented code. Implements each component with full context.
nos.agent4D: Runs tests, verifies consistency and deploys to production with continuous monitoring.
nos.stackDesc: B2B infrastructure built with Next.js, Supabase, Vercel, and multi-agent orchestration where Claude and Cline collaborate in a chain: analysis → design → development → QA → deploy.
nos.costDesc: Every API call is designed with precise context, minimizing tokens and reusing results. The cost per delivered feature is up to 3× more efficient than generic AI usage.
nos.archNote: All agents are orchestrated by a single human architect. There is no automation without supervision. Machine speed with human judgment.
nos.roiTitle: ROI and ROT: Your real return
nos.roiDesc: We don't bring “likes” to your company. We bring clients who went through a funnel and are ready to buy. And we give back the scarcest resource there is.
nos.roi1D: We don't measure reach; we measure how many leads turned into real sales. Every system is optimized so the funnel converts.
nos.roi2D: Every dollar you invest in your system comes back multiplied. It's not a marketing expense — it's infrastructure that generates measurable return.
nos.roi3D: The scarcest resource of a CEO isn't money, it's time. We give back the 3 daily hours you spend answering repetitive messages.
nos.roiNote: ROT is our lethal argument. The scarcest resource of a CEO or a doctor isn't money, it's time. You're telling them: “I'm going to give back the hours you lose on routine tasks”.
nos.garTitle: Why who builds the system matters
nos.gar1D: Nothing starts without understanding your current operation. If there's no real fit, I tell you before charging you.
nos.gar2D: Neither the project nor the judgment is outsourced. You talk to whoever designs and builds the system.
nos.gar3D: Smart Guarantee: you cancel in the first stage if the system doesn't meet the goal. Initial payment refunded if we determine technical unfeasibility before development.
nos.ctaTitle: Is your operation a fit for AYCweb?
nos.ctaDesc: In a 15-minute diagnostic I show you how automation works applied to your concrete case and what it means in cost, speed and time returned.
nos.waMsg: Hi Oscar, I'd like to book a diagnostic to see how AYCweb can automate my operation.
demo.sub: Make the value of systematizing your operation tangible. Adjust your business parameters and the engine calculates investment, monthly savings and ROI in real time.
demo.ctaKicker: Do the numbers make sense for your operation?
demo.ctaTitle: The next step is a real audit
demo.ctaDesc: This demo is a simulation. In the B2B audit we analyze your current operation, detect the real friction points and present you a custom system.
demo.note: We don't take every client. If there's no real fit, we tell you straight.
